mapper.sql: id, owner_user_id, post_id, oss_object_id, oss_version_id, oss_reference_id, upload_session_id, file_name, content_type, content_length, media_kind, lifecycle, upload_status, upload_operation_version, upload_updated_at, reference_status, reference_operation_version, reference_updated_at, video_state, public_url, failure_reason, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into post_media_asset( id, owner_user_id, post_id, oss_object_id, oss_version_id, oss_reference_id, upload_session_id, file_name, content_type, content_length, media_kind, lifecycle, upload_status, upload_operation_version, upload_updated_at, reference_status, reference_operation_version, reference_updated_at, video_state, public_url, failure_reason, create_time, update_time ) values( #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{ownerUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{postId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{ossObjectId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{ossVersionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{ossReferenceId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{uploadSessionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{fileName}, #{contentType}, #{contentLength}, #{mediaKind}, #{lifecycle}, #{uploadStatus}, #{uploadOperationVersion}, #{uploadUpdatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{referenceStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{referenceOperationVersion}, #{referenceUpdatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{videoState}, #{publicUrl}, #{failureReason}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select:
select from post_media_asset where id in
#{id, jdbcType=BINARY}
select from post_media_asset where post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=BINARY} order by create_time asc, id asc
mapper.update: update post_media_asset set lifecycle = 'UPLOADED', upload_status = 'COMPLETED', upload_operation_version = upload_operation_version + 1, upload_updated_at = #{updateTime}, oss_version_id = #{versionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, public_url = #{publicUrl}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}

update post_media_asset set upload_status = 'OBJECT_COMPLETED', oss_version_id = #{versionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, public_url = #{publicUrl}, content_type = #{contentType}, content_length = #{contentLength}, upload_updated_at = #{updateTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY} and upload_status = 'COMPLETING' and upload_operation_version = #{operationVersion}

update post_media_asset set lifecycle = 'BOUND', post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=BINARY}, oss_reference_id = #{ossReferenceId, jdbcType=BINARY}, video_state = #{videoState}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}

update post_media_asset set post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=BINARY}, oss_reference_id = #{ossReferenceId, jdbcType=BINARY}, video_state = #{videoState}, reference_status = 'BIND_PENDING', reference_operation_version = reference_operation_version + 1, reference_updated_at = #{updateTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY} and lifecycle = 'UPLOADED' and reference_status = 'UNBOUND'

update post_media_asset set reference_status = 'RELEASE_PENDING', reference_operation_version = reference_operation_version + 1, reference_updated_at = #{updateTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY} and reference_status in ('BOUND', 'BIND_PENDING') and oss_reference_id is not null

update post_media_asset set reference_status = 'BIND_PENDING', reference_operation_version = reference_operation_version + 1, reference_updated_at = #{updateTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY} and reference_status = 'BOUND' and oss_reference_id is not null

update post_media_asset set reference_status = 'RELEASE_PENDING', reference_operation_version = reference_operation_version + 1, reference_updated_at = #{updateTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY} and reference_status = 'RELEASED' and oss_reference_id is not null
mapper.select: select from post_media_asset where reference_status in ('BIND_PENDING', 'RELEASE_PENDING') order by reference_updated_at asc, id asc limit #{limit}
